page_info: The page shows a Juxtastat game on the Urban Stats website. The current question asks 'Which has a higher % of people with no religion?' comparing 'Winnipeg Urban Center, Canada' and 'Toronto Urban Center, Canada'. There is a progress indicator at the bottom showing that 2 out of 5 questions have been answered (indicated by the two green blocks).
thoughts: The user's goal is to play or complete the daily Juxtastat game. Looking at the progress bar, only 2 questions have been answered so far. The game typically consists of 5 questions. Since the user is currently on the third question and has not reached the results screen, the game has not been completed yet.
